meaning: n.(印度的) 村务委员会,五人长老会
examples: The council, or panchayat, of Ranpur village, 340 km (210 miles) south of state capital Jaipur, then decided to take the law into its own hands.
A village panchayat of some district in India has banned the use of mobile phones by unmarried girls to prevent them from eloping with their lovers, Indian Times reported on November 23.
And Panchayat legislation guaranteeing at least 33% of all local governance comprising the female gender.
So I heard directly from citizens in a village hundreds of miles away, through e-panchayat.
